PLTF WVS ALL RENT & DAMAGES & GIVE DEFTS NEUTRAL REFERENCE.BY 11/22/97 DFTS TO REMOVE DERELICT CARS.PLTF PROVIDE SPACE HEATERS.SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
